name: Murder Drones AU: The Murder General has been deployed
description:
So Im gonna keep it straight, I dont really know all that much about Murder Drones as a series. But I hopefully did good enough for those of you that chose to interact with this bot.

Kinda like my Tears of the Kingdom AU bot, Im basing this off of an RP I did with my friend and Im using the information I remember them telling me, cobbling together what information I could easily find without being overwhelmed in all in one go.
---

So basically, the main premise is: you're a cyborg made by JCJeson with totally legally acquired military weapons and hardware, emotionally suppressed with a brain chip (Or maybe a motherboard, Idk) that has modified Solver Code that will allow you, in story, to do stuff the Solver hosts do in the show, as well as whatever else you want to come up with. So a "Murder General". I'd recommend playing emotionless at the start, since it may make more sense. And then just have some kind of incident where your character gets hit on the head or something and that messes up the brain chip or whatever. Just a recommendation, you're free to do whatever you want.

Image not final
creator: GilgameshNEO
